data.title: OneQode, Hitachi Vantara & Cylix Form Strategic Alliance to Launch Sovereign AI Factory Initiative
data.description: A partnership worth millions has been formed to implement a sovereign-ready AI infrastructure in various global markets, with Australia, Japan, Malaysia, and Singapore being prioritized. The collaboration involves OneQode and Hitachi Vantara, two technology companies aiming to deploy advanced solutions. The initiative, launched in Brisbane, Australia on April 7, 2026, signals a significant effort to establish AI capabilities in key regions. The alliance is expected to boost technological advancements and foster innovation in the participating countries, showcasing the growing importance of AI on a global scale.

data.title: Billionaire CZ faces prison in autobiography detailing Binance's rise, regulatory issues, and personal struggles in crypto's wild ride.
data.description: In his memoir, Changpeng Zhao reflects on Binance's swift growth, challenges with regulations, and a brief incarceration, providing a personal perspective on the tumultuous period in the cryptocurrency world. From navigating regulatory hurdles to experiencing a period of scrutiny, Zhao delves into the highs and lows of leading a company during this volatile time. His narrative sheds light on the significant milestones and setbacks faced by Binance as it emerged as a prominent player in the cryptocurrency space. Through his account, readers gain insights into the rapid rise of Binance amidst regulatory challenges and Zhao's personal experience during a pivotal juncture in the company's journey.

data.title: ThreeD Capital Inc. Issues Early Warning Report in Connection with Disposition of Securities of Avicanna Inc.
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Canadian venture capital firm ThreeD Capital Inc. announced the disposal of 977,000 common shares of Avicanna Inc. through recent transactions. These shares accounted for around 0.8% of all outstanding common shares of AVCN. Following the Dispositions, ThreeD and Sheldon Inwentash, the Joint Actor, collectively saw a decrease of over 2% in their ownership of AVCN on a partially diluted basis compared to their previous early warning report. ThreeD focuses on investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies sectors and is listed on the CSE under the ticker symbol IDK and on the OTCQX as IDKFF.

data.title: The ALS Association Supports Reintroduction of ACT for ALS Bill to Accelerate Treatments and Expand Access for People Living with ALS
data.description: A recent development has brought hope to those suffering from ALS, as the reintroduced Accelerating Access to Critical Therapies for ALS (ACT for ALS) bill aims to expedite the availability of treatments for those affected. This move has been welcomed by The ALS Association, marking a significant step towards assisting individuals living with ALS. The bill, reintroduced on April 7, 2026, in Arlington, Virginia, is set to streamline the process of getting crucial therapies to those in need. This initiative signifies progress in enabling faster access to essential treatments for ALS patients.
